vortex-crossfire-ii-3-9x40.description: Vortex Crossfire II 3-9x40 riflescope. One of the most popular budget hunting scopes on the market, featuring fully multi-coated lenses, a fast-focus eyepiece, and the Dead-Hold BDC reticle for accurate holdovers at extended range.

reticle.description: Dead-Hold BDC reticle with hashmarks for bullet drop compensation at extended ranges.

vortex-crossfire-ii-4-12x44.description: Vortex Crossfire II 4-12x44 riflescope. Versatile mid-range magnification scope ideal for hunting medium to large game, with fully multi-coated lenses and a forgiving eye box.

reticle.description: Dead-Hold BDC reticle with hashmarks for bullet drop compensation at extended ranges.

vortex-crossfire-ii-2-7x32.description: Vortex Crossfire II 2-7x32 riflescope. Compact and lightweight budget scope perfect for rimfire rifles, muzzleloaders, and shotguns. Features a 1-inch tube and fully multi-coated lenses.

reticle.description: V-Plex reticle with clean crosshair design for fast target acquisition.

vortex-crossfire-ii-6-18x44.description: Vortex Crossfire II 6-18x44 AO riflescope. Higher magnification budget scope with adjustable objective for parallax correction, well-suited for varmint and target shooting.

reticle.description: Dead-Hold BDC reticle with hashmarks for bullet drop compensation at extended ranges.

vortex-diamondback-tactical-4-16x44-ffp.description: Vortex Diamondback Tactical 4-16x44 FFP riflescope. First focal plane scope with exposed tactical turrets and an EBR-2C MRAD reticle, making it an excellent entry-level long-range option.

reticle.description: EBR-2C MRAD reticle with mil-based hashmarks for range estimation and holdovers.

vortex-diamondback-tactical-6-24x50-ffp.description: Vortex Diamondback Tactical 6-24x50 FFP riflescope. Higher magnification first focal plane scope with a 50mm objective for excellent light gathering. Popular choice for long-range shooting on a budget.

reticle.description: EBR-2C MRAD reticle with mil-based hashmarks for range estimation and holdovers.

vortex-strike-eagle-1-6x24.description: Vortex Strike Eagle 1-6x24 riflescope. Popular LPVO (Low Power Variable Optic) with illuminated BDC3 reticle, ideal for 3-gun competition and close-to-mid range shooting.

reticle.description: Illuminated AR-BDC3 reticle with bullet drop compensation and wind holds, glass-etched.

vortex-strike-eagle-1-8x24.description: Vortex Strike Eagle 1-8x24 riflescope. Extended range LPVO with 8x top end, illuminated AR-BDC3 reticle, and a 30mm tube. Excellent for AR-platform rifles in competition and duty use.

reticle.description: Illuminated AR-BDC3 reticle with bullet drop compensation and wind holds, glass-etched.

vortex-strike-eagle-3-18x44-ffp.description: Vortex Strike Eagle 3-18x44 FFP riflescope. Mid-to-long range first focal plane scope with EBR-7C MRAD reticle and exposed locking turrets. A solid choice for precision rifle competition on a budget.

reticle.description: EBR-7C MRAD first focal plane reticle with detailed subtensions for precision shooting.

vortex-strike-eagle-5-25x56-ffp.description: Vortex Strike Eagle 5-25x56 FFP riflescope. Long-range first focal plane scope with a 56mm objective and 34mm tube for maximum light transmission. Ideal for long-range precision shooting and PRS-style competition.

reticle.description: EBR-7C MRAD first focal plane reticle with detailed subtensions for precision shooting.

vortex-viper-pst-gen-ii-1-6x24.description: Vortex Viper PST Gen II 1-6x24 riflescope. Premium LPVO with outstanding glass clarity, illuminated VMR-2 MRAD reticle, and a rugged 30mm tube. Trusted by competitive shooters and law enforcement.

reticle.description: Illuminated VMR-2 MRAD reticle with mil-based holdovers and wind dots.

vortex-viper-pst-gen-ii-2-10x32.model: Vortex Viper PST Gen II 2-10x32 FFP
vortex-viper-pst-gen-ii-2-10x32.description: Vortex Viper PST Gen II 2-10x32 FFP riflescope. Compact and lightweight first focal plane scope with exceptional optical quality and exposed CRS Zero Stop turrets. Excellent for lightweight hunting builds.

reticle.description: EBR-4 MRAD first focal plane reticle with mil hashmarks and wind dots for precision.

vortex-viper-pst-gen-ii-3-15x44-ffp.model: Vortex Viper PST Gen II 3-15x44 FFP
vortex-viper-pst-gen-ii-3-15x44-ffp.description: Vortex Viper PST Gen II 3-15x44 FFP riflescope. Versatile first focal plane scope popular for both precision rifle competition and hunting. Features HD extra-low dispersion glass and zero stop turrets.

reticle.description: EBR-7C MRAD first focal plane reticle with detailed subtensions for precision shooting.

vortex-viper-pst-gen-ii-5-25x50-ffp.model: Vortex Viper PST Gen II 5-25x50 FFP
vortex-viper-pst-gen-ii-5-25x50-ffp.description: Vortex Viper PST Gen II 5-25x50 FFP riflescope. Top-tier long-range first focal plane scope with 5x zoom ratio, HD glass, and exposed RZR zero stop turrets. A best-seller for precision rifle competition.

reticle.description: EBR-7C MRAD first focal plane reticle with detailed subtensions for precision shooting.

vortex-razor-hd-gen-iii-1-10x24.description: Vortex Razor HD Gen III 1-10x24 riflescope. Premium LPVO with industry-leading 10x magnification range, APO optical system for edge-to-edge clarity, and illuminated EBR-9 MRAD reticle. The gold standard for duty and competition LPVOs.

reticle.description: Illuminated EBR-9 MRAD reticle with daylight-bright illumination, holdovers, and wind dots.

vortex-razor-hd-gen-iii-6-36x56-ffp.model: Vortex Razor HD Gen III 6-36x56 FFP
vortex-razor-hd-gen-iii-6-36x56-ffp.description: Vortex Razor HD Gen III 6-36x56 FFP riflescope. The flagship Vortex long-range scope with APO HD optical system, 34mm tube, 6x zoom ratio, and ultra-precise exposed turrets with zero stop. Built for elite precision rifle competition and extreme long-range shooting.

reticle.description: EBR-7D MRAD first focal plane reticle with detailed subtensions and Christmas tree holdover pattern.
